name: hb_1_23
requirements: As part of your analysis, on 2025-06-10 compute and store: total_flue_gas_jingtang (Shougang Jingtang Steel), total_flue_gas_hanbao (Hangang Group Hanbao Steel) (float), higher_emitter_company_id (the company_id of the higher emitter, int), emission_ratio (higher/lower, float).

turns.query: Analyze emission patterns between large-scale steel enterprises: Shougang Jingtang Steel vs Hangang Group Hanbao Steel on 2025-06-10.
